title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Wolters Tech Limited
body: "Application number 5092  Applicant Wolters Kluwer (UK) Limited objected to the name used by Wolters Tech Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Application number 5092  Applicant Wolters Kluwer (UK) Limited objected to the name used by Wolters Tech Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 9 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Wolters Tech Limited is changed to 15569596, Ltd. "
